name: Wednesday
description: Netflix's Tim Burton-directed spin on Wednesday Addams at Nevermore Academy

questions.q: Who plays Wednesday Addams in the Netflix series?

source.notes: Ortega also choreographed the viral dance herself.

questions.q: On which streaming platform does Wednesday premiere?

source.notes: One of Netflix's most-watched series launches.

questions.q: In which U.S. state is Nevermore Academy set?

source.notes: The town of Jericho and Nevermore are both fictional.

questions.q: Who plays the goth matriarch Morticia Addams opposite Jenna Ortega?

source.notes: Won a Best Supporting Actress Oscar for Chicago in 2002.

questions.q: Which director helmed four episodes of Wednesday and serves as executive producer?

source.notes: His first major foray into television directing.

questions.q: What is the name of Wednesday's sentient disembodied hand companion?

source.notes: Played on-set by Romanian magician Victor Dorobantu.

questions.q: What kind of supernatural creature is Wednesday's roommate Enid Sinclair?

source.notes: Played by Emma Myers; struggles to 'wolf out'.

questions.q: In what year did Wednesday premiere on Netflix?

source.notes: Released November 23, 2022.

questions.q: Which former Wednesday Addams actress returns in the Netflix series as the villain Marilyn Thornhill?

source.notes: Played Wednesday Addams in the 1991 and 1993 films.

questions.q: Which Saturday Night Live alum plays Uncle Fester?

source.notes: Also starred in Portlandia.

questions.q: Which actor plays Wednesday's father Gomez Addams?

source.notes: Raúl Juliá played Gomez in the 1991 film.

questions.q: Who composed the theme music for Wednesday, a frequent Tim Burton collaborator?

source.notes: Has scored nearly every Tim Burton film since Pee-wee's Big Adventure (1985).

questions.q: What song by The Cramps does Wednesday dance to at the Rave'N?

source.original_a: Goo Goo Muck by The Cramps
source.notes: A 1962 song originally by Ronnie Cook and the Gaylads.

questions.q: Which Lady Gaga song became associated with the dance online, even though it isn't in the episode itself?

source.notes: From 2011's Born This Way album; went viral on TikTok via the dance.

questions.q: Which Rolling Stones classic does Wednesday perform on the cello?

source.notes: Arranged for solo cello; original released 1966.

questions.q: Which country stood in for Jericho, Vermont during filming?

source.original_a: Cantacuzino Castle and Bucharest Botanical Garden
source.notes: Nevermore filmed at Cantacuzino Castle in Buşteni, Romania.

questions.q: What is the supernatural classification of Wednesday's love interest Tyler Galpin?

source.notes: Named for Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde.

questions.q: Who plays Nevermore's imposing Principal Larissa Weems?

source.notes: Christie was Brienne of Tarth on Game of Thrones.

questions.q: Which writer-producer duo created Wednesday for Netflix?

source.notes: Previously created the Smallville TV series.

questions.q: Which 17th-century Puritan is the main antagonist whom Wednesday ultimately confronts in the Season 1 finale?

source.notes: A fictional pilgrim-era witch hunter resurrected via dark magic.

questions.q: Which Oscar-winning costume designer dressed the Addams family for Wednesday?

source.notes: Longtime Tim Burton collaborator; four-time Oscar winner.

questions.q: How many hours of Wednesday were streamed in its first week — then a Netflix record for an English-language series?

source.notes: Later surpassed by Stranger Things Season 4.
